target: Batch: ISS-2344 cross-reference sweep list for EXP-450 P4 (Section 2.9 prose refs), ISS-2341 OPERATOR-APPLY flag for EXP-452 P1

patches.description: Cross-reference sweep list for Section 2.9 promotion. EXP-450 P4 underspecified the cross-reference burden. Grep of data/sections.json: 14 occurrences of 'Section 2.9' and 14 occurrences of '#2-9-the-v13'. Anchor refs handled by EXP-450 P4 backward_compat_anchors. Only prose refs need updating.
patches.sweep_scope: data/sections.json ONLY — generate-html.js and wins.json contain zero refs
patches.anchor_ref_handling: COVERED by EXP-450 P4 backward_compat_anchors. Old anchor ID preserved as alias. All 14 anchor hrefs continue to resolve without change.
patches.prose_ref_handling: All 14 'Section 2.9' occurrences in sections.json must be updated to 'Section 2.1' at P4 integration time. Apply as global replace after applying P4 structural renumbering.
patches.integration_instruction: Apply this sweep ONLY IF EXP-450 P4 is integrated. If operator chooses lighter alternative, defer. Integration command: python3 -c "import re; f=open('data/sections.json'); c=f.read(); f.close(); c2=re.sub(r'Section 2\.9', 'Section 2.1', c); open('data/sections.json','w').write(c2)"
patches.condition: EXP-450 P4 is integrated (V13 coordinate promoted from 2.9 to 2.1)

patches.description: OPERATOR-APPLY required for EXP-452 P1. The patch targets build-scripts/generate-html.js (counting-methodology paragraph generalization from tidal-only to 4 SC clusters). This is an infrastructure file — decider cannot self-apply. Full replacement text is in EXP-452's P1 patch in monitor/analyst/expansions/EXP-452-HOL-TAXONOMY-c2-application-consistency.json.
patches.operator_action: Read EXP-452 P1 in monitor/analyst/expansions/EXP-452-HOL-TAXONOMY-c2-application-consistency.json. Apply P1 find/replace to build-scripts/generate-html.js. Run node build.js html, node test.js, then commit.
patches.reason_cannot_apply: build-scripts/generate-html.js is a git-owned infrastructure file; decider does not touch infrastructure files

note_on_iss2341: EXP-452 P1 is not yet applied (generate-html.js still contains tidal-only counting methodology paragraph). Confirmed by grep.
